title: xylorhiza glabriuscula
intro: Xylorhiza glabriuscula, also known as the shrubby twigsage or bush twigsage, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Xylorhiza glabriuscula include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
